source_phrases: Each pass admits 1 vehicle for free.   Please note that reserving a library pass does not guarantee that space will be available on your preferred date.  Passes may be checked out for 1 day and are due back before library opens the day following use.
This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the Reference Desk. Please call 781-259-8465 x 3 with any questions.
Please note that the Main Beach at Walden pond will be closed for the 2025 summer season due to construction.
